_meta.methodology: Grounded in verified vendor findings for all 25 institutions. Tiers reflect: incumbent present or not, grad volume, ease of contact, venue control, and travel/clustering from Saskatoon.
_meta.competition_summary: 9 institutions have a confirmed incumbent flower vendor. The Commencement Group holds 7 (NAIT, MacEwan, SAIT, NorQuest, Concordia, St Mary's Calgary, Lethbridge Polytechnic); two use LOCAL florists that already do a give-back (Red Deer Polytechnic=Stems Flowers; Athabasca=Woodland+Wildflower). The other 16 are open, unnamed/in-house, or guests-only.

tiers.rationale: No commercial incumbent, verified contact, strong fit or lowest travel.

targets.why: Lloydminster runs its own ceremony (Lloyd Gymnasium), flowers only via in-house bookstore roses, no pro vendor. Closest AB campus to Saskatoon.
targets.first_action: Email Kyla Graham (kyla.graham@lakelandcollege.ca / 1-800-661-6490 x8441) with a managed-stand proposal for Lloydminster.

targets.why: Largest volume in AB, single external venue (Jubilee), 3 periods/yr, easy inbox (convocation@ualberta.ca), NO flower vendor.
targets.first_action: Email convocation@ualberta.ca; confirm Jubilee retail rules.

tiers.tier: 2 - Strong openings, verify venue then pursue
tiers.rationale: No or unnamed vendor and meaningful volume; several have arena/concert-hall venues that may control retail.

targets.why: Non-exclusive vendor concourse (Calgary); easy to join. Contact convocation@mtroyal.ca.
Surprisingly large & growing (~1,192 grads, going to 2 ceremonies 2027), no vendor. Remote (Slave Lake) + arena venue. Contact records@northernlakescollege.ca.
~1,000-1,200 grads over 4 ceremonies, no vendor. Remote (Lac La Biche). Contact Student Services 1-866-623-5551.
Unnamed foyer flower vendor (not Commencement Group), southern AB. Verified line 403-320-3323. Pairs with Lethbridge Polytechnic.
~480 grads, no vendor. Co-op Place arena may control retail. Named contact Jenna Williams jwilliams@mhc.ab.ca.
No vendor found, Calgary. Jack Singer/Arts Commons venue likely controls retail. Contact grad@bowvalleycollege.ca.
Unnamed foyer vendor, central corridor. Contact info@oldscollege.ca / 403-556-8281.
Guests/post-ceremony gifting only (grads restricted during ceremony). Contact convinfo@ucalgary.ca.

tiers.tier: 3 - Small / remote openings, low effort or opportunistic
tiers.rationale: No vendor but low volume (small privates) or far from any cluster.

targets.why: Small Calgary arts school; Southern Jubilee venue.
Small Lacombe private; twice-yearly; church venue; families use delivery florists.
No vendor, on-campus theatre, but remote (Fort McMurray).
No vendor, but remote (Grande Prairie); Grande Prairie + Fairview ceremonies.

tiers.tier: 4 - Incumbent present - no head-on flower play
tiers.rationale: Complementary products or contract-renewal timing only.

local_florist.vendor: Stems Flowers & Cafe (already does alumni give-back)
